# Performance Audit

Use this skill when investigating slow UI, slow builds, large bundles, or runtime bottlenecks.

## Checklist

- Large dependencies
- Unnecessary client-side code
- Hydration issues
- Excessive re-renders
- Expensive computed values
- API waterfalls
- Missing caching
- Image sizing/loading
- Lazy-loading opportunities
- Build pipeline bottlenecks

## Output

- Observed issue
- Likely bottleneck
- Evidence
- Recommended fix
- Validation approach
